metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5144
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2, 4: cultured hippocampal and cortical neurons were stained for PIAS3, synaptophysin (SYP) and PSD95 (DLG4) and imaged using both confocal and SIM super-resolution microscopy. PIAS3 was mostly localized to the nucleus with some cytoplasmic localization, but also showed partial co-localization with pre- and post-synaptic marker proteins. Detection levels of PIAS3 at the synapse were generally lower than PIAS1.. Experimental description: M&M: "For the preparation of primary hippocampal and cortical neurons we employed the protocol previously described by Colnaghi et al.26 Dissected hippocampi and cortexes from two-day-old CD1 mice were incubated ..."

antibody:
PIAS3 76 μg/mL (D5F9 XP; Cell Signaling)
